protein_name: Can degrade fibronectin, laminin, gelatins of type I, III, IV, and V; collagens III, IV, X, and IX, and cartilage proteoglycans. Activates procollagenase. Belongs to the peptidase M10A family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
